content:
put_str,
            "-f", "rawvideo",
            "-pix_fmt", "rgb24",
            "pipe:1",
        ])
        .stdin(Stdio::null())
        .stdout(Stdio::piped())
        .stderr(Stdio::null())
        .spawn()
        .map_err(FfmpegError::NotFound)
}
struct FrameReader {
    child: Child,
    frame_index: u64,
    width: usize,
    height: usize,
    frame_bytes: usize,
    done: bool,
}
